hypothesis: When the workflow is extended to include modeled energy consumption for heating/cooling using standard industrial thermal profiles to 1400°C and predicted purification costs based on byproduct solubility and separation steps, the Ca3SiO5+SiO2 synthesis route will become more economically favorable than the CaO+SiO2 route for Ca2SiO4 in over 30% of realistic market-price scenarios with ±30% reactant price volatility.
